x-enumeration-literals.name: Full Reward Application
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are applied to fully cover the transaction or redemption.

Comment:
Example: Paying for a $50 item entirely with points.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Partial Application
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are applied partially along with another payment method.

Comment:
Example: Using points for $30 and paying the rest with a card.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Statement Offset Application
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are applied to reduce outstanding balances or statements.

Comment:
Example: Points used to reduce a credit card bill.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Auto-Debit Application
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are automatically applied when a qualifying transaction occurs.

Comment:
Example: Points automatically used for recurring subscription payment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Manual Application
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are applied only when the customer chooses to redeem them.

Comment:
Example: Customer manually selects points to pay for an order.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tiered Application
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are applied based on priority, tiers, or categories.

Comment:
Example: Premium customer points are applied first, standard customer points applied later.
